focus_areas: Light field depth estimation bottlenecks (Lambertian assumption & EPI limitations)
Proposed physics-aware and full-angle cost volume solutions

contribution_claim anchor: Enumerate the 3 specific contributions (Physics-aware material perception, GCD/adaptive energy adjustment, MACVO-Net) in a cohesive paragraph format
At least one concrete data point or example illustrating the severity of non-Lambertian failures and depth ambiguity in current SOTA methods
